home.heroDesc: All the tools you need for CrossFit & HYROX training — 1RM Calculator, WOD Timer, and Workout Library, provided for free.

tools.calculatorDetail: Automatically calculate your CrossFit/Powerlifting 1RM and percentage tables.
tools.timerDesc: AMRAP · EMOM · Tabata · For Time · HIIT
tools.timerDetail: 5 modes, sound alerts + screen stays on.
tools.wodDetail: Girl · Hero · Open WODs. Includes scaling options.
tools.mapDetail: Check drop-in prices and info for CrossFit boxes across the country at a glance.
tools.communityDetail: HYROX Schedule · Local Comps · Discussion Board

home.featuresDesc: CrossFit Box Drop-in Map & HYROX Competition Community
home.statsDesc: CrossFit & HYROX training contents provided by FITTERS STUDIO
home.aboutDesc: CrossFit is a training methodology that performs Functional Movements that are Constantly Varied at High Intensity. It improves real-life and sports performance by balancing the 10 elements of fitness, including cardiovascular endurance, strength, power, flexibility, and agility.

points.p1Desc: Practical exercises based on everyday movements.
points.p2Desc: Maximum efficiency training with short, intense WODs.
points.p3Desc: No boredom with a different WOD every day.
